title: taraxacum corneolum
intro: Taraxacum corneolum, also known as the Corn Marigold or Corn Daisy, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum corneolum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and promote skin healing. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
